entries.cookieConsent.analytics.detail: These cookies help us measure performance and improve the website. They are optional.
entries.cookieConsent.analytics.performance.copy: Helps measure speed, loading, and reliability.
entries.cookieConsent.analytics.summary: Helps us understand how the website performs.
entries.cookieConsent.analytics.title: Analytics
entries.cookieConsent.analytics.usage.copy: Helps identify useful sections and areas that need improvement.
entries.cookieConsent.analytics.usage.title: Usage insights
entries.cookieConsent.copy: We use cookies to keep Neuroartan secure, remember essential settings, and improve the experience when you allow it.
entries.cookieConsent.education.whatAreCookies.c: Cookies help websites remember settings, protect sessions, and support selected functions.
entries.cookieConsent.education.whatAreCookies.d: Cookies are small data files that help a website remember settings, maintain security, and work correctly.
Some cookies are required. Others are optional and only used with your consent.
They may remember language, privacy choices, or session state.
Neuroartan separates required cookies from optional ones so your choices remain clear.
entries.cookieConsent.education.whyWeUseThem.cop: We use them for security, core functionality, and optional improvement insights.
entries.cookieConsent.education.whyWeUseThem.det: We use cookies to keep Neuroartan secure, remember consent choices, and improve the website when allowed.
Required cookies help protect the website and keep key flows reliable.
Required cookies keep sessions, consent choices, and basic interface behavior working.
Optional cookies help us understand performance and improve the experience.
entries.cookieConsent.essential.detail: These cookies keep the website secure, stable, and functional. They cannot be disabled.
entries.cookieConsent.essential.integrity.copy: Keeps language, consent, and basic interface settings stable.
entries.cookieConsent.essential.integrity.title: Interface integrity
entries.cookieConsent.essential.security.copy: Helps protect the website from misuse and harmful activity.
entries.cookieConsent.essential.security.title: Security & abuse prevention
entries.cookieConsent.essential.session.copy: Keeps essential website sessions working as expected.
entries.cookieConsent.essential.session.title: Session continuity
entries.cookieConsent.essential.summary: Required for security, accessibility, and core website functions.
entries.cookieConsent.essential.title: Essential
entries.cookieConsent.essentialNote: Necessary cookies are always active. Optional cookies are your choice.
entries.cookieConsent.experience.detail: These cookies remember selected preferences and improve return visits. They are optional.
entries.cookieConsent.experience.summary: Remembers optional preferences when you allow it.
entries.cookieConsent.experience.title: Experience
entries.cookieConsent.language.statusAuto: Current selection: Auto detected automatically. Choose a language or region to update the website and return to cookie settings.
entries.cookieConsent.settingsIntro: Choose which optional cookies Neuroartan may use.
entries.home.aboutDefinition.text: ICOS is a cognitive operating system for voice, memory, reflection, and continuity. It helps thought become structured, searchable, and usable over time.
entries.home.aboutDefinition.title: What ICOS is
entries.home.closing.line1: ICOS is built to make thought clearer, memory more useful, and continuity easier to work with.
entries.home.closing.line2: Voice, memory, reflection, and patterns become one structured cognitive layer.
entries.home.icos.anchor: ICOS is a cognitive operating system for voice, memory, reflection, and continuity
entries.home.icos.body: It gives thought a place to be captured, organized, searched, and developed over time.
entries.home.icos.highlight: Built as a structured layer for clearer thinking, usable memory, and long-term cognitive continuity.
entries.home.notes.text: Research, product notes, and system thinking behind ICOS and Neuroartan.
entries.home.notes.title: Insights & Research
entries.home.updates.text: Product progress, research notes, and release updates. A clear public record of what is live, what is changing, and what comes next.
